_comment: Drop this into your Claude Code / Cursor MCP config. Replace <absolute-path-to-repo> with the checkout path on this machine, paste a freshly-issued token from the admin UI into MCP_TOKEN, and point MONGODB_URI at the same Mongo the CMS uses.

_scopes.read:site + write:site: publish snapshots, layout mode, ISR revalidate, feature flags
_scopes.admin:bundle: bundle.export + bundle.import — full-site replace. Issue only to operators seeding or migrating whole sites.
